info.description: WhatsMiau - WhatsApp API compatible with Evolution API. Provides instance management, messaging, and chat operations over WhatsApp Web.
info.title: WhatsMiau API

get.description: Returns API status, version, and WhatsApp Web client version

delete.description: Revokes a message in the chat so it is deleted for all participants.

post.description: Marks one or more messages as read in a WhatsApp conversation
Sends a presence status (composing/available) to a WhatsApp contact, with optional auto-stop delay
Checks whether the given phone numbers are registered on WhatsApp
post.summary: Check if numbers exist on WhatsApp

get.summary: Join a group using an invite code
Get info about an invite code (no join)

post.summary: Revoke current invite code and generate a new one
Send group invite link via text to phone numbers
Toggle disappearing messages for the group

get.description: Returns all instances, optionally filtered by name or ID

post.description: Creates a new WhatsApp instance with the given name and optional configuration

get.description: Initiates connection for an instance. Returns a base64-encoded QR code PNG if not yet connected, or a connected status message.
Returns the QR code as a raw PNG image buffer. Returns 204 No Content if already connected.
get.summary: Get QR code as PNG image

get.description: Returns the current connection state of the specified instance

post.description: Creates a new WhatsApp instance with the given name and optional configuration

delete.description: Disconnects and permanently removes the specified instance

get.description: Returns all instances, optionally filtered by name or ID

delete.description: Disconnects the WhatsApp session for the given instance without deleting it

put.description: Updates webhook and proxy settings for the given instance

delete.description: Disconnects and permanently removes the specified instance

post.description: Initiates connection for an instance. Returns a base64-encoded QR code PNG if not yet connected, or a connected status message.
Disconnects the WhatsApp session for the given instance without deleting it

get.description: Returns the current connection state of the specified instance

delete.description: Revokes a message in the chat so it is deleted for all participants.

post.description: Sends a presence status (composing/available) to a WhatsApp contact, with optional auto-stop delay
Marks one or more messages as read in a WhatsApp conversation

post.summary: Create a new group already linked to a community
Link an existing group to a community

get.summary: List participants across all linked groups of a community

post.summary: Approve or reject pending join requests
Toggle join-approval mode for a community
Toggle who can add members (admins only or all)
Remove a group from a community

get.summary: Join a group using an invite code
Get info about an invite code (no join)

post.summary: Revoke current invite code and generate a new one
Send group invite link via text to phone numbers
Toggle disappearing messages for the group

post.description: Sends an audio file (by URL) as a WhatsApp voice message to the specified number
Sends an interactive buttons message (reply type) or PIX payment
Sends a document file by URL to a WhatsApp number
Sends an image file by URL to a WhatsApp number
Sends an interactive list message with selectable options
Sends a text message to a WhatsApp number via the specified instance
Sends a video file by URL to a WhatsApp number
Sends an interactive buttons message (reply type) or PIX payment
Sends contact cards (vCard) to a WhatsApp number
Sends an interactive list message with selectable options
Sends a geographic location to a WhatsApp number
Sends a media file (image or document) based on the mediatype field
Sends a multiple-choice poll to a WhatsApp number
Sends a round/circle video note to a WhatsApp number
Sends an emoji reaction to a specific message identified by its key
post.summary: Send a reaction to a message

post.description: Sends a status (text/image/audio/video) to status@broadcast
Sends a WebP sticker to a WhatsApp number
Sends a text message to a WhatsApp number via the specified instance
Sends an audio file (by URL) as a WhatsApp voice message to the specified number

image.description: Image can be either a base64-encoded JPEG or a URL pointing to a JPEG.
